---
title: "About"
---

## About Me

I grew up in the Greater Boston area and am currently a student at Lawrence University, where I study quantitative economics and history, with a minor in statistics and data science.

Outside the classroom, I founded the Lawrence University Investment Club and have served as both Vice President and President, where I focus on risk management and help peers build rigorous stock proposals. I am also a member of the Lawrence University hockey team and a graduate of Northfield Mount Hermon School.

My interests sit at the intersection of data, economics, and history. I am drawn to social questions and to understanding how larger forces shape individual outcomes.

---

## Skills & Coursework

**Economics & Finance**
- Quantitative Economics
- Financial Markets & Investment Analysis
- Econometrics

**History**
- American History
- Economic History
- European History
- Historical Research & Writing

**Data & Statistics**
- Statistics & Data Science (minor)
- R, Python, Excel
- Data visualization and regression modeling

---


## Contact

- Email: [jebdee20@gmail.com](mailto:jebdee20@gmail.com)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/JebDee](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeb-dee)
- GitHub: [github.com/JebDee](https://github.com/JebDee)
- Phone Number: 978-935-6394
